title: Chapter One
text:
## The Book of the Threes

Listen up, all my relatives, those who have gathered here: I’ll teach you Dhamma! Painful is birth again and again.

Rouse yourselves, try harder! Devote yourselves to the instructions of the Buddha! Crush the army of death, as an elephant a hut of reeds.

Whoever shall meditate diligently in this teaching and training, giving up transmigration, will make an end to suffering.
